title: Coastal access: Section 52 notice for Weybourne to Hunstanton
body: "On 21 March 2018, Natural England submitted a report to the Secretary of State for Environment, Food and Rural Affairs setting out the proposals for improved access to the Norfolk coast between Weybourne and Hunstanton.  The Secretary of State has decided to approve the proposals and their decision is outlined in this notice.  The Secretary of State has also made available a copy of the reports given to them by the Appointed Person relating to objections made about this stretch. "
